name: undo-and-completion-flicker
title: Add undo and fix completion flicker
creator: codex-agent
notes: Added persistent undo for add/toggle/edit/delete/reorder via the existing importMarkdown restore path, added desktop and mobile undo controls plus Ctrl+Z outside text inputs, and preserved the active document during in-flight completion updates to prevent completed rows from flickering. Verified lint, typecheck, tests, build, Android debug APK build, Windows portable exe build, and Windows exe startup smoke test. Hotfix: fixed remote undo/import/export by preserving TodoApi method ownership instead of detaching class methods, preventing RemoteTodoApi.applyOperation from losing this. Rebuilt packages as release\MarkdownTodoList-windows-portable-0.1.2-undo-hotfix.exe and release\MarkdownTodoList-android-debug-0.1.2-undo-hotfix.apk.
